description: Insurance undervalue - less than 110% required by UCP600

expected_issues.description: Insurance coverage is below minimum 110% of invoice/CIF value

false_positive_checks.description: Legacy insurance undercoverage duplicate should be suppressed when UCP600-28E is present.
Invoice umbrella should not leak into the pure insurance undercoverage path.
Transport umbrella should not leak into the pure insurance undercoverage path.
Insurance umbrella should be suppressed when specific UCP600-28E fires.
